templates.title: Emote Mode
templates.prompt: Chat with only emotes for the next {{minutes}} minute{{plural:minutes:s}}.

templates.title: Speed Demon
templates.prompt: Compete with {{streamer}} in https://play.typeracer.com/ and win.

templates.title: FPS God
templates.prompt: Compete with {{streamer}} in https://krunker.io/ and win.

templates.title: Emote Spam
templates.prompt: Post your favourite emote in chat.

templates.title: Clip It
templates.prompt: Post your favourite clip of {{streamer}} in chat.

templates.title: Pasta Chef
templates.prompt: Post your favourite copypasta from {{streamer}}'s stream in chat.

templates.title: Top Tier Glazing
templates.prompt: Send a paragraph in chat strictly glazing {{streamer}}.

templates.title: Chat War
templates.prompt: Insult {{target}} in chat.

templates.title: Wholesome Moment
templates.prompt: Praise {{target}} in chat.

templates.title: Riddle Me This
templates.prompt: Solve this riddle: I can run 100m in 7 seconds and throw a javelin 700m, but only when I’m talking. Who am I?

templates.title: Gifter
templates.prompt: Gift {{count}} Sub{{plural:count:s}} to {{streamer}}.

templates.title: Prime Time
templates.prompt: Use your Twitch Prime on {{streamer}}'s channel.

templates.title: Appreciation Post
templates.prompt: Tell {{streamer}}'s chat all the things you love about them.

templates.title: Voice of God
templates.prompt: Post a copypasta using MonsterTTS.

templates.title: Hype Train
templates.prompt: Drop your hype emote of the day.

templates.title: LOUD NOISES
templates.prompt: Type only in ALL CAPS for the next 5 messages.

templates.title: Ice Breaker
templates.prompt: Ask a fun question in chat that others can answer.

templates.title: Oracle
templates.prompt: Guess the next game {{streamer}} will play.

templates.title: Poet Laureate
templates.prompt: Send a haiku about the stream.

templates.title: Snack Time
templates.prompt: Share a cozy snack recommendation in chat.

templates.title: Professor
templates.prompt: Teach chat a random trivia fact.

templates.title: Bilingual
templates.prompt: Translate a hype phrase into another language.

templates.title: Sobriety Test
templates.prompt: Type the alphabet backwards in chat.

templates.title: Soundcloud Rapper
templates.prompt: Write a two-line rap about the stream.

templates.title: Vibe Check
templates.prompt: Describe {{streamer}}'s vibe in exactly 3 words.

templates.title: Greeter
templates.prompt: Show love to a new chatter in chat.

templates.title: DJ Chat
templates.prompt: Share a song with the chat.

templates.title: Hieroglyphs
templates.prompt: Describe the stream using only emojis.
